_meta.method: Unit-safe multiples re-rating: Forward P/E + EV/EBITDA + Analyst Target

sanity_bounds.note: Methods with base fair value outside this multiple of current price are excluded from blend as outliers.

fwd_pe.rationale: Stock trades at 29.3× forward earnings. Applying Technology sector cohort 29-name P/E percentiles (bear 20.3× / base 31.0× / bull 46.1×) implies fair value re-rating.

fwd_ev_ebitda.rationale: Stock trades at 20.1× forward EBITDA. Applying Technology sector cohort 29-name EV/EBITDA percentiles (bear 22.7× / base 42.1× / bull 101.5×) implies re-rating. Note: first-order ratio approximation — ignores marginal net-debt sensitivity.

analyst_target.rationale: Mean of 21 sell-side analyst targets; Low/High give the dispersion band.

blended.note: Weighted average of methods that passed sanity filter. Bull/Bear bands derived from sector cohort multiple percentiles + analyst Low/High; not a probabilistic confidence interval.

fwd_ev_ebitda.rationale: Stock trades at 38.3× forward EBITDA. Applying Technology sector cohort 29-name EV/EBITDA percentiles (bear 22.7× / base 42.1× / bull 101.5×) implies re-rating. Note: first-order ratio approximation — ignores marginal net-debt sensitivity.

analyst_target.rationale: Mean of 22 sell-side analyst targets; Low/High give the dispersion band.

outliers.reason: fair value 3.7× current price — outside sanity band [0.4×, 2.5×]. Likely a sector-cohort mismatch.

blended.note: Weighted average of methods that passed sanity filter. Bull/Bear bands derived from sector cohort multiple percentiles + analyst Low/High; not a probabilistic confidence interval.

analyst_target.rationale: Mean of 36 sell-side analyst targets; Low/High give the dispersion band.

blended.note: Weighted average of methods that passed sanity filter. Bull/Bear bands derived from sector cohort multiple percentiles + analyst Low/High; not a probabilistic confidence interval.
